note: outreach_email artifact has no recipient email address. The LLM cannot fabricate real email addresses — this is by design. To send: open this file, add the correct 'to' address, and call _handle_send_outreach_batch() directly or re-queue with recipient_email set.
subject: Insights on client communication at Varghese Summersett
body: I've noticed that criminal defense firms often receive reviews highlighting communication-related themes. This can indicate a potential gap in client expectations and satisfaction. Clarion specializes in turning client feedback into actionable governance insights. Our weekly governance briefs classify these themes and provide structured action items for leadership. If you're open to it, I can walk through what that would look like using a sample of your firm's public reviews.
